node_proposed.name: Project DIVA F Vocaloid roster (Crypton + guest voicebanks)
node_proposed.scope: SEGA Project DIVA F licensed roster as represented in Weiss Schwarz PD/S22, NOT the entire Vocaloid universe

description: Excuse me, sir, oh dear, Edgelord wanted to draw a Miku-modules mirror — Divine Goddess and Dark Angel are clearly the sublime/inverted-fallen pair — but I'm so sorry, the cohort is just too overdetermined for that to be the right move. Nine enriched corpus cards across five named voicebank characters, with twenty-plus more PD/S22 cards queued, and no Vocaloid character node anywhere in the graph. I do hope you don't mind, sir, but the node has to come first or every future Miku-and-friends edge will just point at the absence where the cohort should be. I scoped it tight — Project DIVA F roster, not all of Vocaloid — to match the eld-cinderella-cycle precedent. I'm sorry to step on Edgelord's edge.
citations: [Crypton Future Media — Character Vocal Series product pages]
[SEGA — Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA F official site and in-game module catalog]
[Vocaloid Wiki — per-character pages: Hatsune Miku, Kagamine Rin and Len, Megurine Luka, MEIKO, KAITO, Kasane Teto, Yowane Haku]
[Weiss Schwarz — Hatsune Miku -Project DIVA- f set page, en.ws-tcg.com PD/S22-E series]
[In-corpus: nine enriched PD/S22 cohort cards' vision passes stamping suspected_ip to canonical voicebank names]

potion_rule_check.evidence_summary: Vocaloid is Yamaha's actual designer-named singing-synthesizer software family; Crypton's Character Vocal Series is the canonically-published voicebank line (CV01 Miku, CV02 Rin/Len, CV03 Luka); SEGA's Project DIVA F is officially licensed from Crypton; Weiss Schwarz PD/S22 is officially licensed from SEGA/Crypton. Roster membership is designer-stamped per Crypton product pages and the Project DIVA F in-game module catalog. No BBL squinting required.
potion_rule_check.labor_thesis_status: labor-coded reading (virtual-idol-as-cooperative-labor-product) is body-prose curatorial overlay, not hub attribution; node body names it as such; related_hubs: [] kept empty per wave-81 P3 discipline.

scoping_discipline.scope_rejected: entire Vocaloid universe / all Crypton voicebanks / all Vocaloid TCG appearances ever
scoping_discipline.rationale: Mirrors the eld-cinderella-cycle scoping principle (one set's roster, not all of Cinderella in MTG). If future BBL acquisitions bring non-PD/S22 Vocaloid cards (Project Sekai, Bushiroad Miku sets, etc.), a parent crypton-vocaloid node should be authored above this one and this PD/S22 cohort re-parented.

next_pass_suggestions.candidate: Megurine Luka enrichment + attach to PD/S22 roster
next_pass_suggestions.rationale: Three PD/S22 Luka cards already in corpus (Eternal White, Light & Casual, San-no-Sakura Maple); not yet vision-passed. When triviabot/vision enrich them, append to roster appears_on. Currently 4 of 6 core Crypton voicebanks have enriched corpus members; full coverage is two cards away.
next_pass_suggestions.priority: high — completes core Crypton roster coverage

next_pass_suggestions.candidate: KAITO enrichment + attach to PD/S22 roster
next_pass_suggestions.rationale: Two PD/S22 KAITO cards in corpus (Requiem, Half Tights); enrichment will give the cohort its first male-Crypton-voicebank representative beyond Kagamine Len.

next_pass_suggestions.candidate: Hoenn whale dyad (Wailmer + Wailord) edge check
next_pass_suggestions.rationale: Confirm both are in corpus and both enriched; if so, evolution-line edge is a clean 1:1 mirror similar to mareep-line / larvitar-line patterns. Marginal but quick.

next_pass_suggestions.candidate: Magia Record Coordinator / Magius / Mage-Class system
next_pass_suggestions.rationale: Mitama Yakumo's Coordinator role is wave-101 trivia. Magia Record has designer-stamped magical-girl-classification system per Madoka-franchise wiki. Below threshold today (likely 1-2 Coordinator-adjacent cards enriched) but worth re-checking when MR enrichment hits ~5+ cards.
next_pass_suggestions.priority: low — defer to next MR enrichment wave

next_pass_suggestions.candidate: Shedinja halo + ghost + sacred cross-cutting bridge
next_pass_suggestions.rationale: Flavor-anchor for future bundle work per wave-101 vision note. Not a node candidate yet; revisit when a Pokémon-ghost-sacred cohort surfaces with 3+ members.
Last Edgelord deferred until ~8 enriched. Wave 101 added Matsuo. Likely still below threshold; check enriched count next wave before commissioning a Claw-Organization or Reigen-Mob duo node.

next_pass_suggestions.candidate: PD/S22 non-character climax / song / item cards cohort
next_pass_suggestions.rationale: Cards like Continuing Dream, Time Machine, Unhappy Refrain, Sadistic.Music Factory, World's End Dance Hall A/B etc. are song-named non-character cards. If enrichment surfaces 5+ of these as a designer-coordinated set-bounded cohort (climax-cycle / song-event-cycle), a sibling node could anchor them. Not character-layer; possibly _symbols/ if treated as mechanical-primitive cohort per the wave-38 schema extension. Defer.
